transcript: Speaker A: Do you like spending three long hours on an old English test? Why stress yourself out when you can take the Duolingo English test and finish in just one hour, all from the comfort of your home? Save yourself the extra hours, take the DET, finish fast, and get back to planning for your dream university abroad. Speaker B: Out with the old, in with the DET.
on_screen_text:
Old English Tests VS Duolingo English Test
Test complete!
TEST RESULTS 150/160
Trusted by over 3 million students worldwide!
duolingo english test
Out with the OLD
In with the DET
Register today at englishtest.duolingo.com
summary: The ad contrasts the stressful three-hour traditional English exams with the convenient, one-hour Duolingo English Test taken from home. It emphasizes saving time to focus on university planning. Viewers are urged to register at englishtest.duolingo.com.
